body.title: Granny Weatherwax: ticket gateway + coding orchestrator device
body.result: GrannyWeatherwaxDevice: ticket intake+audit gate, tag→worker routing (weighted graph), Hebbian strengthening, CC escalation, status tracking. 28 tests green.
body.description:
Implement Granny Weatherwax as a rack device — the single entry point for all coding tickets. Responsibilities: (1) ticket intake + filing-time audit gate (deterministic where possible, Haiku for judgment calls); (2) routing via capability graph — ticket tags → typed edges → worker nodes (Igor, Scraps, Librarian, CC); (3) Hebbian strengthening on routing decisions — successful routes develop stronger edges; (4) CC escalation path for novel/HIGH-inertia tickets; (5) status tracking as single source of truth for work state. cc_queue.py becomes pure storage underneath her.

Routing is graph traversal — no inference in the common case. Novel routing escalates to Haiku/Sonnet, result compiles back as a new edge.

**Affected files:** devices/ (new devices/granny/ rack device), cc_queue.py (becomes storage layer only), devices/librarian/ (Granny calls Librarian for capability graph queries)
**Design rules:** igor-uses-not-contains; routing logic is graph traversal not inference; HIGH-inertia tickets always escalate to CC; Hebbian strengthening via same mechanism as interpretive_edges
**Scope boundary:** IN — ticket intake, audit gate, routing, status tracking, CC escalation; OUT — scheduling/triggers (Nanny), world-interaction dispatch (Nanny)
**Test plan:** ticket filed via Granny routes to correct worker based on tags; novel tag combination escalates to CC; routing edge strengthens after successful dispatch; HIGH-inertia ticket surfaces to CC without routing
